title: TRAI Assesses Network Quality Across North 24 Parganas and Nadia districts and adjoining areas in the State of WB, along NH-12 from Barasat to Raiganj and along Railway route from Howrah to Bardhaman via Bandel, all under WB LSA
description: TRAI Assesses Network Quality Across North 24 Parganas and Nadia districts and adjoining areas in the State of WB, along NH-12 from Barasat to Raiganj and along Railway route from Howrah to Bardhaman via Bandel, all under WB LSA nitinkumar Mon, 04/06/2026 - 18:34 File Press Release No. 47 (1.12 MB) Date Mon, 04/06/2026 - 12:00
